label: Timeline
description: A vertical timeline with alternating content connected by a center line. Each entry has date, heading, description, optional image. Use for company history, roadmaps, milestones, event chronologies. Layout: vertical center line with circular markers, content alternates left/right on desktop, single side on mobile.

items.title: Company Founded
items.description: Started with a small team of three passionate developers in a garage office. Our vision was to build tools that empower creators worldwide.

items.title: Series A Funding
items.description: Secured $5M in Series A funding, allowing us to expand the team to 20 people and open our first real office space downtown.

items.title: Platform Launch
items.description: Launched our flagship platform to the public, reaching 10,000 users within the first month. Featured in major tech publications.

items.title: Global Expansion
items.description: Expanded operations to Europe and Asia with localized teams. Crossed 100,000 active users and launched enterprise tier.
